info.title: How to Use?
info.content:
Type a topic (max 3 words) or pick from popular topics. You can also upload a photo of your notes — AI will detect the topic automatically.

In Exam mode, set the question count (5, 10, or 15) and difficulty (Easy / Medium / Hard). After finishing, you'll see the correct answer and explanation for each question.

In Flashcards mode, AI turns the topic into question-answer cards. Tap a card to reveal the answer and swipe through them.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.policy:
Effective: March 4, 2026

Quorax collects account information (name, email), app usage data, content you submit to AI modules, and subscription/payment data (processed by Apple/Google — we never store your card details).

Your data is used to deliver services, improve the app, and prevent fraud. We do not sell your personal data.

Third-party providers: Anthropic (Claude AI — does not use your data to train models), Supabase, RevenueCat, Google AdMob, Apple/Google.

You have the right to access, correct, delete, and port your data, and to withdraw consent at any time. Contact: privacy@quorax.app

For the full Privacy Policy, see Profile > Privacy Policy.

onboarding.aiConsentBody:
Quorax uses Anthropic's Claude AI to power its features. To provide these services, the following data may be sent to Anthropic:

• Your messages and chat history
• Text you submit for editing or note generation
• Math problems (including photos)
• Images you upload for analysis

This data is sent to Anthropic, Inc. (anthropic.com) and is processed according to their privacy policy. It is not sold or used to train AI models without consent.
